reason: The sole finding is a fabricated image alt text. The invented label 'ユーザ情報入力バッチ処理フロー' is contextually accurate and does not misrepresent any technical specification. All substantive content (file layouts, validation rules, error codes) is correctly transcribed. No medium or high impact finding exists.

findings_assessment.justification: The alt text 'ユーザ情報入力バッチ処理フロー' was invented—the source RST image directive carries no alt text. However, the label is contextually accurate (the image depicts the batch processing flow for this very spec), and image alt text is metadata that an AI agent reading the knowledge file would treat as a descriptive caption rather than a normative specification value. No technical facts are misrepresented, and no decision an agent or developer would make based on this file is affected. Phase E did not resolve it: the Phase E output is byte-for-byte identical to the Phase D output, indicating the fix agent either skipped the change as too minor to address or failed silently without modifying the alt text.
